title: Dasymalla chorisepala
taxonomy: Dasymalla chorisepala is a plant species that belongs to the family Annonaceae. This family comprises over 2,000 species of flowering plants, commonly known as the custard apple or soursop family. The genus Dasymalla is a small group of plants, with Dasymalla chorisepala being one of the few known species within it. Annonaceae plants are primarily found in tropical regions of the world, with a few species also found in subtropical areas. Further research may be necessary to fully understand the classification of Dasymalla chorisepala within the Annonaceae family.
